channel.title: Trending repositories on GitHub today · GitHub
channel.description: Trending repositories on GitHub today · GitHub - Powered by RSSHub

item.title: MadsLorentzen/ai-job-search
item.description:
AI-powered job application framework built on Claude Code. Fork it, fill in your profile, and let Claude evaluate jobs, tailor CVs, write cover letters, and prepare you for interviews.

Language: TypeScript
Stars: 15752
Forks: 4794
item.author: MadsLorentzen

item.title: addyosmani/agent-skills
item.description:
Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents.

Language: JavaScript
Stars: 74456
Forks: 8025
item.author: addyosmani

item.title: ruvnet/RuView
item.description:
π RuView turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time spatial intelligence, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.

Language: Rust
Stars: 79229
Forks: 10658
item.author: ruvnet

item.title: TencentCloud/TencentDB-Agent-Memory
item.description:
TencentDB Agent Memory delivers fully local long-term memory for AI Agents via a 4-tier progressive pipeline, with zero external API dependencies.

Language: TypeScript
Stars: 7755
Forks: 715
item.author: TencentCloud

item.title: prisma/prisma

Stars: 46617

item.title: mvanhorn/last30days-skill
item.description:

Language: Python
Stars: 50862
Forks: 4246
item.author: mvanhorn

item.title: iOfficeAI/OfficeCLI
item.description:
OfficeCLI is the first and best Office suite purpose-built for AI agents to read, edit, and automate Word, Excel, and PowerPoint files. Free, open-source, single binary, no Office installation required.

Language: C#
Stars: 12175
Forks: 824
item.author: iOfficeAI

item.title: asgeirtj/system_prompts_leaks
item.description:
Extracted system prompts from Anthropic - Claude Fable 5, Opus 4.8, Claude Code, Claude Design. OpenAI - ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking, GPT 5.5 Instant, Codex. Google - Gemini 3.5 Flash, 3.1 Pro, Antigravity. xAI - Grok, Cursor, Copilot, VS Code, Perplexity, and more. Updated regularly.

Language: JavaScript
Stars: 54350
Forks: 8849
item.author: asgeirtj
